data.body: Ticket 1aa8-cdde (columned-azure-flea) implemented: verify_findings() now tracks per-chunk outcome_counts (clean/recovered/empty_outcomes/unrecoverable) and flags semantically-empty successful-but-empty chunk outputs as a new empty_outcomes contract_violation, distinct from shape_failures (StructuredOutputError) and honest-degrade (generic Exception, unchanged). TDD: wrote 4 tests RED-first (1 happy-path + 3 held-out edge/mixed), held out 3 from implementer subagent, subagent implemented against happy-path only, restored held-out set -> all 31 tests in test_review_kernel.py green. Mutation check: disabling empty-detection branch correctly turned 2 held-out tests RED, confirming teeth. Lint+typecheck green. Full test suite (make test) running in background.
